introduction: In this presentation, we will discuss the projected budget allocation for our internal marketing department for the fiscal year 2025. This information will guide our strategic planning and resource allocation.

subsections.heading: Marketing Department's Historical Budget Trend
subsections.content:
• In 2019, the marketing budget experienced a 15% increase from the previous year
• The marketing budget for FY2020 was $2.1 million CAD, focusing primarily on digital campaigns
• The budget allocated for brand development in FY2021 saw a 25% increase
• In FY2022, 30% of the budget was allocated for website redevelopment and SEO
• The marketing budget for FY2023 was $2.8 million CAD, with a surge in social media advertising
• FY2024 saw the implementation of a new, budget-friendly marketing automation tool
subsections.justification: Although it provides historical data, it does not deliver any information about the FY2025 marketing budget.

subsections.heading: FY2025 Marketing Budget Projection
subsections.content:
• The company is considering an increase in the budget for digital campaigns
• The budget for traditional advertising might experience a decrease
• MediConn is exploring collaborations with influencers to boost brand awareness
• There may be an increased budget allocation for content development and SEO
• The company is planning to invest in a new customer relationship management (CRM) system
• A portion of the budget might be allocated for staff training in new marketing tools and techniques
subsections.justification: This slide discusses potential budget allocations but doesn't reveal the total budget for FY2025.

subsections.heading: Implications of the Proposed Budget on Marketing Strategy
subsections.content:
• A higher digital campaign budget may allow for increased reach on social media platforms
• Decreased traditional advertising budget may impact visibility among older demographics
• Collaborations with influencers could enhance brand reputation and user engagement
• Increased investment in content development could improve organic search rankings
• Implementing a new CRM system could enhance customer relationship management
• Training staff on new tools and techniques could improve efficiency and effectiveness
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the potential impact of budget changes, but doesn't specify the FY2025 budget.

conclusion: The projected budget for FY2025 will play a significant role in shaping our marketing initiatives. We must strategically allocate resources to ensure effective execution of our marketing strategies.

image_queries.slide_title: Implications of the Proposed Budget on Marketing Strategy
